docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-08-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LEONARDO BUENDIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHNNY MARENCO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETAINED WITH THE CASE FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER AGREEMENT ON FEBURUARY 8, 2021. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF LEONARDO BUENDIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHNNY MARENCO IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1000 TO BE PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MARCH 19TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
